commands: if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update -y && sudo apt-get install -y curl; fi
if ! command -v unzip >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update -y && sudo apt-get install -y unzip; fi
if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com -o /tmp/get-docker.sh && sudo sh /tmp/get-docker.sh; fi

if [ ! -x /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose ]; then sudo curl -SL https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/latest/download/docker-compose-linux-x86_64 -o /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose; fi
if ! command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd /tmp && curl -fsSL https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip -o awscliv2.zip && unzip -q -o awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install --update; fi
DB_PASSWORD=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /bookcabin/free-tier/database/password --with-decryption --region ap-southeast-1 --query Parameter.Value --output text)

cat <<EOF | sudo tee /home/ubuntu/.env
DB_HOST=bookcabin-free-tier-db.cvam4kquex6v.ap-southeast-1.rds.amazonaws.com
DB_PORT=3306
DB_DATABASE=bookcabin
DB_USERNAME=admin
DB_PASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD
REDIS_HOST=bookcabin-free-tier-redis.hauvgq.0001.apse1.cache.amazonaws.com
REDIS_PORT=6379
SQS_QUEUE_URL=https://sqs.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/479149268499/bookcabin-ota-webhook-queue
AWS_REGION=ap-southeast-1
AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=ap-southeast-1
APP_IMAGE=479149268499.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/bookcabin-app:latest
API_IMAGE=479149268499.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/bookcabin-api:latest
EOF

cat <<EOF | sudo tee /home/ubuntu/docker-compose.prod.yml
services:
  app:
    image: 479149268499.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/bookcabin-app:latest
    container_name: bookcabin-app
    env_file:
      - /home/ubuntu/.env
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    environment:
      APP_ENV: free-tier
      BOOKING_AGENT_URL: http://booking-agent:9000
    restart: unless-stopped
  booking-agent:
    image: 479149268499.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/bookcabin-api:latest
    container_name: bookcabin-booking-agent
    env_file:
      - /home/ubuntu/.env
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
    environment:
      APP_ENV: free-tier
    restart: unless-stopped
EOF
aws ecr get-login-password --region ap-southeast-1 | sudo docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 479149268499.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com
